title: A2A Terminal Brief Progress Semantics Fixture (v0)
description: Machine-readable fixture for Terminal Brief progress semantics, covering report types, evidence boundaries, safety gates, and parent aggregation rules. Frozen at Contract v0 (2026-05-16).

v0Freeze.note: Progress report types, evidence requirements, and progress-vs-terminal boundary are frozen.

progress.description: Generic progress update for active work.

progressCheckpoint.description: Progress update tied to a durable checkpoint.

progressAccept.description: Broker-level or runner-level acknowledgment of a progress report.

noTerminalOutboxAckMutation.description: Progress must not mutate terminal-outbox ACK columns.
noTerminalOutboxAckMutation.requiredEvidence: terminalOutboxAckMutated: false in every progress record

noProviderNotification.description: Progress must not trigger provider notifications unless a separate approved contract explicitly authorizes progress notification.
noProviderNotification.requiredEvidence: liveProviderSend: false in every progress record

noAggregateTitleAdvancement.description: Progress must not change the parent-round aggregate Terminal Brief title.
noAggregateTitleAdvancement.requiredEvidence: Aggregate title rendering considers only terminal entries

noTerminalKindOverlap.description: Progress kind values must not overlap with terminal kind values (done, pr, blocked).
noTerminalKindOverlap.requiredEvidence: kind values 'progress', 'progress-checkpoint', 'progress-accept' do not overlap with terminal kinds

noCursorAdvancement.description: Progress must not advance the terminal-outbox cursor.
noCursorAdvancement.requiredEvidence: Terminal-outbox cursor advances only on terminal events

sequenceIntegrity.description: Progress sequences must be monotonically increasing, gap-detected, and replay-idempotent.
sequenceIntegrity.requiredEvidence: Broker or fixture validation checks sequence continuity

boundaryRules.progressOnlyLane: Must not block/delay parent round terminal aggregate state

validExamples.summary: Completed contract skeleton, in-progress on fixture definition.
Reached checkpoint after contract skeleton. Awaiting operator input on scope boundary.

invalidExamples.reason: progress kind overlaps with terminal kind
